creator: hugo@leisink.net
text:
I approve the patch. After all, I sent it. Only with a different e-mail 
address :)

Hugo


> Maintainer of www/hiawatha,
>
> Please note that PR ports/138385 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/138385
>
>
